text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The book is real and well-documented. Its correct title is *Spline Models for Observational Data* (not "Splines Models"), authored by Grace Wahba, published in 1990 in the CBMS-NSF Regional Conference Series in Applied Mathematics by SIAM. The cited reference contains only a minor typo ("Splines" instead of "Spline") in the title, which is a trivial error and not evidence of hallucination.
LINK: https://epubs.siam.org/doi/10.1137/1.9781611970128
